pi_items.source: Consistent across export_result.sh and verifier.py; reasonable for full-screen PNG screenshot at 800x520+ resolution

pi_items.metadata_value: Navigate to the Reading category in GCompris and open the Hangman activity
pi_items.verified_value: Hangman is in the Games category, not Reading category
pi_items.source: Official GCompris website (https://www.gcompris.net/index-en.html) explicitly lists: 'games: chess, memory, align 4, hangman, tic-tac-toe' and Reading contains 'letters, words, reading practice, typing text'

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified as correct: expected_output_path is /home/ga/hangman_result.png, min_file_size_bytes is 10000 (reasonable for full-screen PNG), and all 7 scoring values (totaling 100 points) match between task.json and verifier.py. CRITICAL ISSUE: The task description incorrectly states 'Navigate to the Reading category in GCompris' but according to the official GCompris website, Hangman is located in the Games category, not Reading. This is a significant misdirection that would cause an agent to navigate to the wrong menu section.
